title: Code Indentation Explorer
description: Students identify which lines of a Python snippet are correctly indented, which have errors, and explain what block each line belongs to.
creator: Moving Rainbow
author: Dan McCreary
subject: Moving Rainbow
chapter_title: Python Basics — Variables, Data Types, and Operators

learningObjectives: Students identify which lines of a Python snippet are correctly indented, which have errors, and explain what block each line belongs to.

assessmentOpportunities: Students explain the demonstrated relationship in their own words.
